name: Ensalada Compurste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together browned hamburger, refried beans, and taco mix. Heat through.
2. Warm tortilla shells by wrapping in a damp kitchen towel and placing in a warm oven (250-300 degrees).
3. Lay the warmed tortilla shell flat on a plate. Place a layer of hamburger mixture and grated cheese on the shell, then roll up so one edge folds against the plate.
4. Sprinkle additional cheese on top. Place under broiler until the cheese melts. Remove from oven.
5. Add lettuce, beets, corn, olives, onions, green beans, and tomatoes on top.
6. Serve with salad dressing of choice: Hidden Valley Creamy, Ranch, or Italian are good options.
